title: Inviting Peruvian Long Beans Paella
description: A tangy and snappy paella that blends Peruvian flair with Mediterranean comfort, featuring katsuramuki-cut Chinese long beans in a fragrant rice broth.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a paella pan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in the katsuramuki-cut long beans and cook for 3 minutes until slightly tender.
Add the arborio rice and stir for 1 minute to coat with oil and vegetables.
Pour in tomato puree, smoked paprika, and cumin, stirring until rice is evenly coated.
Add the vegetable broth, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 18 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and stir in fresh lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste.
Let the paella rest for 5 minutes covered with a clean towel.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
Serve hot straight from the pan.
